text_preview:
- 01. REG. n.101

- 02. PLACE: COLARES-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 28 Mar 76 – 8:30 pm

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. FORM: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE:. ..

- 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, in the northwest / southeast direction. He made a curve to the north.

- 09. SPEED: Average

- 10. ALTITUDE: 2,000 m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 800 m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): Father ALFREDO LA Ó

- 13. NOTE: Upon reaching the lighthouse, you made a sharp turn to the north.

- 01. REG. n. 102

- 02. PLACE: Campinas da Vigia – City of Vigia-PA

- 03. DATE /
summary: Operação Prato reports 101–110: ten sightings Mar–Jul 1978 in Pará; report 103 shows object projecting three intense blue light sources over the sea; reports 105/106 describe circular craft over Benevides.
